## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] `make vet` is clean
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` reports nothing (run `make fmt`)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `tonys schema` metadata if commands or flags changed
- [ ] Added/updated tests near the changed behavior
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or live-service calls added to tests
